inline_comments: Never trust configured installPath blindly for recursive deletes.
Remove plugin references from config (pure config mutation). Returns a new config with the plugin removed from entries, installs, allow, load.paths, and slots.
Remove linked path from load.paths (for source === "path" plugins)
Reset memory slot if this plugin was selected
Clean up undefined properties from newPlugins
Uninstall a plugin by removing it from config and optionally deleting installed files. Linked plugins (source === "path") never have their source directory deleted.
Delete installed directory if requested and safe.
Directory deletion failure is not fatal; config is the source of truth.
